response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains — the core requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/prototype work (bachelor’s thesis) and outdated NI LabWindows roles, with no evidence of production-level fixed income systems, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or financial domain knowledge.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across languages and platforms
Strong DevOps and CI/CD background with Docker, GitLab, and deployment systems
Proven ability to lead open-source projects and technical workshops
concerns: No verifiable professional C++ development on Windows in finance
Missing SQL Server/Oracle experience in capital markets context
Domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking is absent
